name: PÜNCT
author: Kris Burm (2005) / AGP port
description: PÜNCT (Kris Burm, 2005; GIPF project #6): a connection game with stacking on a 211-field hexagon. Each player has 18 pieces, each covering three adjacent fields in a straight, angular or triangular shape. Add pieces flat or slide a piece's PÜNCT in a straight line to jump on top of others; the colour on top counts. Win by linking any pair of opposite sides.
